text.text:
The maraca is a rhythmic Tinkers' weapon. It buffs you and your allies through melody, and each action changes how it fights.
Left-click for Quick Beat (♪), right-click for Adagio (♩), F key for Resonance (♫), and Q key to play recorded combos.
Quick Beat: normal attack; Adagio: critical attack; Resonance: area damage.

properties: [♪-♪-♩-♩]: Party Time! - turns other melodies, boosts Resonance, inflicts Imbalance on the main target
